message:
🌱 kubevirt: Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to allow non-virtiofsd (#1050)

* 🌱 Add kubevirt: Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: mark kubevirt#14015 as proposed, remove closed PR reference

PR #14110 was closed without merge. Replacement PR #16413 is still
open. Remove pr field from sourceUrls, change status from 'completed'
to 'proposed', and update resolution to note fix is in progress.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-14015-mark-virtiofs-field-in-filesystem-as-omitempty-to-allow-non-virti",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices",
+    "description": "Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "proposed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevirt deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevirt version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nhelm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevirt installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\nWe're having our own CSI driver providing socket for `vhost-user-fs` protocol and we'd like to be able to not to start unused virtiofsd container by kubevirt. We're using sidecar to inject our filesystem device settings in domain XML."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to…",
+        "description": "Before this PR:\nWe're having our own CSI driver providing socket for vhost-user-fs protocol and we'd like to be able to not to start unused virtiofsd container by kubevirt. We're using sidecar to inject our filesystem device settings in domain XML. Unfortunately, despite being a pointer to struct Virtiofs field is not marked with omitempty, so not setting this one can be properly seriali\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Mark `Virtiofs` field in `FIlesystem` as `omitempty` to…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The fix is in progress but not yet merged. PR #14110 was closed without merge. The replacement PR #16413 is still open and tracks the fix for marking the Virtiofs field as omitempty to allow non-virtiofsd vhost devices.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
